title: NicerTabBackground
description: Minecraft mod that replaces the black bar in the create world screen with a dark version of the background image
body:
# NicerTabBackground

Minecraft mod that replaces the black bar in the create world screen with a dark version of the background image

## What this mod does

It replaces the entirely black tab background with a semi-transparent black color that allows the background image to still be visible.  
It will also work with other mods utilising the tab navigation widget.  
![before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Fq7WSGBY/images/99d45744200a7f5e34f09c1182c04843a6e7bbb5.png)
![after](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Fq7WSGBY/images/65701c7d8268bbac096afbc6bf172f8e54ee9ea7.png)

## Dependencies

None! Like most of my mods, it works out of the box.
